text: Which of the following is/are the SOLAS requirements for rocket parachute flare?

options.text: A) The rocket shall, when fired vertically, reach an altitude of not less than 300m
B) Burn uniformly with an average luminous intensity of not less than 30000 cd
C) Having a burning period of not less than 40s

explanation: SOLAS requirements for rocket parachute flares dictate they reach 300m altitude, burn for at least 40s, and emit 30,000cd of light intensity, confirming all options are correct.
